message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "protection": "Clear definition of intellectual property ownership",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not specify who owns the intellectual property rights to the software developed.",
      "risk": "Without clear ownership, there may be disputes over the use and distribution of the software, leading to potential legal issues.",
      "mitigation": "Include a clause that clearly defines the ownership of intellectual property rights for the software developed under the agreement.",
      "suggested_clause": "All intellectual property rights, including but not limited to copyrights, patents, and trade secrets, in the software developed under this Agreement shall be owned by Company upon full payment for the services rendered.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "protection": "Limitation of liability for Developer",
      "why_missing": "The contract lacks a limitation of liability clause, exposing the Developer to potentially unlimited damages.",
      "risk": "In the event of a breach or failure, the Developer could face significant financial liabilities that could threaten their business.",
      "mitigation": "Add a limitation of liability clause that caps the Developer's liability to a certain amount.",
      "suggested_clause": "In no event shall Developer's liability for any claim arising out of this Agreement exceed the total amount paid by Company to Developer under this Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "protection": "Confidentiality obligations",
      "why_missing": "There is no mention of confidentiality obligations regarding proprietary information shared between the parties.",
      "risk": "Without confidentiality protections, sensitive information may be disclosed or misused, leading to competitive disadvantages.",
      "mitigation": "Incorporate a confidentiality clause that obligates both parties to protect each other's confidential information.",
      "suggested_clause": "Both parties agree to keep confidential all proprietary information disclosed during the term of this Agreement and shall not disclose such information to any third party without prior written consent.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "protection": "Dispute resolution mechanism",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not outline a process for resolving disputes that may arise between the parties.",
      "risk": "In the absence of a clear dispute resolution process, conflicts may escalate to litigation, which can be costly and time-consuming.",
      "mitigation": "Include a dispute resolution clause that specifies mediation or arbitration as the preferred method for resolving disputes.",
      "suggested_clause": "Any disputes arising out of or related to this Agreement shall be resolved through mediation, and if unsuccessful, through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of [Arbitration Organization].",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "protection": "Termination rights",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not specify the conditions under which either party may terminate the agreement.",
      "risk": "Without clear termination rights, parties may be locked into an unfavorable agreement without a way to exit.",
      "mitigation": "Add a termination clause that outlines the conditions under which either party may terminate the agreement.",
      "suggested_clause": "Either party may terminate this Agreement upon [number] days written notice if the other party fails to perform any material obligation under this Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.7
    }
  ]
}
